enga01.title: FIXED PRICE
enga01.description: Clear deadlines and a fixed budget. Perfect for projects with specific technical requirements.

enga02.title: Time ＆ Material
enga02.description: Hourly-based billing for maximum agility. Ideal for projects with shifting requirements.

enga03.title: HYBRID
enga03.description: Base cost + performance bonuses. We share the risks and success together with you.

enga04.title: REV. SHARE
enga04.description: Full product immersion. We invest our time and expertise in exchange for a share of the profit.

sol01.title: ANALYTICS
sol01.desc: Full funnel transparency. Amplitude and AppsFlyer for a deep understanding of user behavior.

sol02.title: ATTRIBUTION
sol02.desc: Accurate tracking of traffic sources and optimization of advertising budgets based on ROAS.

sol03.title: MONETIZATIOn
sol03.desc: Payment system integration and paywall optimization via RevenueCat, Adapty, and Stripe for Web & App.

sol04.title: OPTIMIZATION
sol04.desc: Constant improvement of conversion rates through systematic A/B testing and feedback analysis.
